reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210NGNFTmFiMXBoVUdGNWVURnRVSGR1VFhOdlkzYxAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es muy agradable, está climatizado y limpio. Con respecto a la comida, aceptable las pastas, la ensalada César incompleta, además muy altos los precios. Un plato de ñoquis + una ensalada+ una coca Zero + propina $ 72700. Muy elevado para un almuerzo de parada técnica. La atención de los mozos, bien, atentos... Creo que en el afán de atender bien, por momentos habían tres personas haciendo el mismo servicio! Ojalá puedan ajustar algunos detalles!

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice, air-conditioned, and clean. As for the food, the pasta was acceptable, the Caesar salad was incomplete, and the prices were very high. A plate of gnocchi + a salad + a Coke Zero + tip came to $72,700. Very expensive for a quick lunch stop. The waiters were attentive and helpful... I think in their eagerness to provide good service, at times there were three people doing the same job! I hope they can improve a few things!
